articles.author: Frank Newport, Lydia Saad
articles.title: Rise in Young Men's Religiosity Realigns Gender Gaps - Gallup News
articles.description: While Americans overall have grown less religious, young men have bucked the trend and now outpace young women for the first time.
articles.content: WASHINGTON, D.C. — Driven by a recent increase, young men in the U.S. have now surpassed young women in saying religion is "very important" in their lives. Gallup’s latest data, from 2024-2025, show … [+8463 chars]
